series_metadata.series_description: This form is attached to the IT-1040 and indicates the amoutn of accumulation distribution income to be included in Ohio Adjusted Gross Income. That amount is placed on line 20 of the IT-1040.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: records in office files IT-1040 which IT-4970 is applicable is destroyed and ; Electronic: records in office files IT-1040 which IT-4970 is applicable is deleted and
